name: nucleus-stt
description: Self-hosted Twilio Media Streams -> STT service for nucleus-phone. Copy-forked from aunshin-phone (bead nucleus-phone-rgja). Two per-track bridges per call drive moonshine (live) / whisper.cpp (batch) Python workers; transcript chunks POST to nucleus-phone /api/stt-ingest. Deployed as its own Render service (Stage B3).
